title: Compostbin
body:
# Overview

When you have too many crop seeds, using the vanilla composter one by one can be exhausting. The author couldn't stand it anymore, so this mod was created.

# Content

This mod adds a compost bin where you can throw all your seeds, and they will decompose into bone meal.

The composting probability is consistent with the vanilla composter.

You can customize compostable items and their probabilities in the configuration file.

# Gallery
